problem id: bfee75d5
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(6)

examples:
  11010110 -> 10110101
  00110111 -> 11001101
  10011011 -> 11100110
  10001001 -> 01100010
  11110111 -> 11111101
  00011101 -> 01000111
  11111101 -> 01111111
  00001110 -> 10000011
  10110111 -> 11101101
  01101111 -> 11011011

query: 00001001
predicted answer: 01000010
